emails.subject: Re: TAGE Resume Submittal
emails.body: Re: TAGE Resume Submittal Vince, Thanks for forwarding the resume. We have generally had great success with ex-Koch people. He sounds might like he may be a good fit for Michael L. Miller in principal investments. At this point I have very recently inherited two other stron VPs from EI and therefore will probably focus on a few Manager and Associates for the near term but I would like to keep James' resume for further opportunities. He sounds like someone we should at least meet with and figure out a spot within Wholesale Services. What do you think? Regards, -Larry-
